block_11: Indicators can help traders identify certain signals and trends in the market. One of the most basic and easy one is Simple Moving Average.
block_12: Many traders start with SMA because it can spot the trend and give a strong BUY/SELL signal.
block_13: How to read the SMA signals
block_14: When SMA crosses the candlestick chart from above, it is a signal to SELL.
block_15: A crossing from below is a BUY signal.
